reviews.comment:
Buenas atención, aunque un poco viejos los surtidores, es destacable que tienen ypf boxes y equipo para calibrar neumáticos sin costo, a diferencia de la mayoría de las estaciones que te cobran por ese servicio que debe ser gratis.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, although the pumps are a bit old, it is noteworthy that they have YPF service stations and equipment to calibrate tires at no cost, unlike most stations that charge you for this service that should be free.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15539995661554460615/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXcllTYVhBEAE
